query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_users,
  SUM(CASE WHEN subscriptionStatus = 'active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as paid_active,
  SUM(CASE WHEN subscriptionStatus = 'trialing' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as trialing,
  SUM(CASE WHEN subscriptionStatus = 'inactive' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as inactive,
  SUM(CASE WHEN subscriptionStatus = 'canceled' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as canceled,
  SUM(CASE WHEN subscriptionStatus = 'past_due' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as past_due,
  MIN(createdAt) as first_signup,
  MAX(createdAt) as latest_signup
FROM users;
